case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. POLARIO FRAZIER ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70525162) AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, POLARIO
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, POLARIO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRAZIER, POLARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE # 321 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70596514)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, POLARIO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70525162), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC SERVED JUL-19-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, POLARIO
